steps.title: Identify what describes thrown-away devices
steps.content: The key phrase is “becoming harmful ____”. We need a noun for what discarded devices become. The word “harmful” is decisive—it signals something negative or problematic.

steps.title: Match the answer to the signal
steps.content: ”Waste” names what happens to thrown-away devices—harmful waste is a major environmental concern. The other three don't fit: advice and rewards contradict the “harmful” signal (they're inherently positive), while positions doesn't fit the environmental context. That matches choice B — B is correct.
